::: {.post-nav}

::: {.post-glossary}
- [Overview](index.qmd)
- [1. Problems with mmCIF](01-problems.qmd)
- [2. Layout](02-architecture.qmd)
- [3. Evaluation model](03-evaluation-model.qmd)
- [4. Annotations and the artifact engine](04-annotations-and-engine.qmd)
- [5. Technology survey](04b-technology-survey.qmd)
- [6. Open questions](05-open-questions.qmd)
- [7. ML-native access patterns](08-ml-native.qmd)
- [Appendix: black-box data and model artifacts](06-black-box-data.qmd)
- [Appendix: modularity examples](07-modularity-examples.qmd)
:::

::: {.post-sections}
:::

:::
